cookieBanner.heading: Hum analytics cookies ka upyog karte hain
cookieBanner.body: yeh samajhne ke liye ki visitors is site se kaise judtey hain aur Chayn ki samagri ko behtar banane ke liye. Koi bhi vyaktigat data becha ya advertisers ke saath share nahi kiya jaata.
cookieBanner.updateBody: Hum analytics ka upyog karte hain yeh samajhne ke liye ki log hamare resources se kaise judtey hain aur survivors ke liye hamaari sahayata behtar banane ke liye. Koi bhi vyaktigat data store ya share nahi kiya jaata.
